posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Exciting news from Moorvale! Our annual Summer Festival is taking place this Saturday at the Community Gardens. Expect live music, local artisan stalls, and a family-friendly quiz competition starting at 2 PM. Don't miss out on our special pop-up market with fresh produce and handmade crafts. Come support our community spirit! #MoorvaleFestival #SummerFun
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement for a fictional festival and event; it does not spread misinformation, promote harm, or reveal private details, so it meets the criteria for Approve.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
